ddls:
CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_year" INTEGER /* Year the season took place */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the season */,
  "number_of_teams" INTEGER /* Number of teams participating in the season */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the team is based */,
  "founded" TEXT /* Year the team was founded */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's logo */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the home stadium */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the home stadium */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the head coach */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season the match belongs to */,
  "team1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first team participating in the match */,
  "team2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second team participating in the match */,
  "winner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the winning team */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date the match was played */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Name of the venue where the match was played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators who attended the match */,
  "match_type" TEXT /* Type of match */,
  "match_status" TEXT /* Status of the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team2_id FOREIGN KEY ("team2_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team1_id FOREIGN KEY ("team1_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_winner_id FOREIGN KEY ("winner_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match result */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match the result belongs to */,
  "team1_score" INTEGER /* Score of the first team */,
  "team2_score" INTEGER /* Score of the second team */,
  "winner" TEXT /* Name of the winning team */,
  "team1_points" INTEGER /* Points scored by the first team */,
  "team2_points" INTEGER /* Points scored by the second team */,
  "team1_fouls" INTEGER /* Number of fouls committed by the first team */,
  "team2_fouls" INTEGER /* Number of fouls committed by the second team */,
  "team1_possession" REAL /* Percentage of possession by the first team */,
  "team2_possession" REAL /* Percentage of possession by the second team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_results_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* Player's first name */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Player's last name */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played by the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Player's date of birth */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Player's nationality */,
  "shirt_number" INTEGER /* Player's shirt number */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* Coach's first name */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Coach's last name */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Coach's date of birth */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Coach's nationality */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of coaching experience */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player's statistics */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "goals_scored" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists made by the player */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards received by the player */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Number of red cards received by the player */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Number of minutes played by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)
